title: Myrsine congesta
taxonomy: Myrsine congesta is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. It is native to New Zealand. The plant is classified in the kingdom Plantae, and its classification is further broken down into the phylum Angiospermophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Ericales, family Myrsinaceae, genus Myrsine, and species M. congesta. The classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the plant kingdom.
